tour_fullscreen_desc: Gyroscope and 360° fullscreen mode will be active in the final version of the pilot.
tour_guided_desc: Starts a guided 3D narrative journey through the historical and botanical points of interest of the garden.
tour_select_zone_desc: Loading high-definition 3D model for zone: "{{zoneName}}" (Coming soon).
ar_companion_desc: Point your camera at points of interest or scan QR codes on the garden paths to display 3D models and exclusive botanical information.
ar_zoom_desc: Digital zoom control {{level}} will be active when paired with native cameras in the pilot version.
ar_botany_filter_desc: This feature will overlay detailed taxonomic sheets directly on the garden plants.
ar_scan_desc: Point your device at the QR plaque of a tree or a zone to unlock its interactive card.
ar_audio_desc: Starts spatialized audio narration based on your exact position and orientation in the path.
guide_bot_welcome: Hello! I am your AI companion, trained on the history, botany, and architecture of the Jardin Majorelle. How can I enrich your journey today?
guide_attachment_desc: Attach an image to the AI Guide
guide_local_fallback: Welcome to Jardin Majorelle! I am operating in local fallback mode. The garden features the stunning blue villa, Berber museum, cactus gardens, water lilies, and bamboo forest. How can I help you explore?
auth_credentials_desc: Please enter your credentials to access the secure dashboard.
auth_legal: PROPRIETARY SYSTEM — ACCESS RESTRICTED TO AUTHORIZED JARDIN MAJORELLE PERSONNEL ONLY.
manage_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this zone?
manage_logout_desc: Are you sure you want to logout?
guide_prompt_villa: Tell me about the Villa Bleue (Villa Oasis)!
guide_prompt_cactus: Tell me about the Cactus Garden!
guide_prompt_lilies: Tell me about the Floating Water Lilies!
guide_prompt_museum: Tell me about the Berber Museum!
guide_prompt_bamboo: Tell me about the Bamboo Forest!
zone_desc_bassin: Main area of the garden with a decorative pond
zone_info_bassin: Iconic location of the Jardin Majorelle
zone_desc_jardin_cactus: Collection of cacti and succulent plants from different regions of the world
zone_desc_cafe_bousafsaf: Traditional café surrounded by lush vegetation
zone_desc_allee_jardin: Paths allowing circulation and discovery of the different areas
zone_desc_jardin_bambou: Shaded space composed of giant bamboos offering a soothing atmosphere
zone_info_jardin_bambou: Ideal area for natural sound immersion
zone_desc_villa_bleue: Iconic building of the garden with its intense blue architecture
zone_info_villa_bleue: Iconic symbol of the Jardin Majorelle
zone_desc_musee_berbere: Museum presenting traditional Berber culture and objects
zone_desc_cafe_majorelle: Dining space in the heart of the garden
zone_desc_boutique: Sales space for souvenirs and artisanal products
zone_desc_librairie: Space dedicated to books on art, botany, and culture
quote_text:
"Nature is the greatest
artist of all."
